source.title: Coordinated Emergence of Hippocampal Replay and Theta Sequences during Post-natal Development.

confidence_rationale: Good architectural support that waking and offline sequence generation share substrate. This supports using one unresolved-goal representation across both modes, though the mapping to explicit ghost-goal traces is indirect.
failure_signatures: If waking and offline sequence generation required unrelated substrates, a shared ghost-goal representation would be less motivated.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Theta sequences and replay co-emerge as coordinated sequence-generation capacities.
mapping.ree_translation: The same unresolved-goal substrate can reasonably feed both waking ghost probes and offline replay rather than being duplicated.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Developmental co-emergence is indirect support for adult shared mechanism.

confidence_components.notes: Useful for the cross-mode architectural link.
